zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anthony Babington於1476年7月2日出生在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可時，他的父親Sir Thomas Babington27歲，母親Edith FitzHerbert19歲。他於1498年3月20日與Elizabeth Ormond結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1536年8月23日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾金斯頓 奧 素亞享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾金斯頓 奧 素亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anthony Babington于1476年7月2日出生在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Babington27岁，母亲Edith FitzHerbert19岁。他于1498年3月20日与Elizabeth Ormond结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1536年8月23日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾金斯頓 奧 素亞享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾金斯頓 奧 素亞。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anthony Babington was born on 2 July 1476, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Babington, was 27 and his mother, Edith FitzHerbert, was 19. He married Elizabeth Ormond on 20 March 1498. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 23 August 1536, in Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anthony Babington est né le 2 juillet 1476, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Babington, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Edith FitzHerbert, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Ormond le 20 mars 1498. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 23 août 1536, à Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

März 1498 Elizabeth Ormond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 23. Lui sposato Elizabeth Ormond il 20 marzo 1498. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 23 agosto 1536, nel Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Babingtonが1476年7月2日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Babingtonは27歳，母Edith FitzHerbertは19歳であった。1498年3月20日にElizabeth Ormondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1536年8月23日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアキングストン オン ソアルで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアキングストン オン ソアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Babington(이)가 1476년 7월 2일 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Babington(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith FitzHerbert(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1498년 3월 20일 Elizabeth Ormond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1536년 8월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 킨그스턴  소르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 킨그스턴  소르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Babington nasceu em 2 de julho de 1476, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Babington, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Edith FitzHerbert, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Ormond em 20 de março de 1498. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1536, em Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Kingston on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ormond 20 марта 1498 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 23 августа 1536 г. в местности кингстон он соар, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности кингстон он соар, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
